parsed.summary: This commit adds an interactive menu to the /glm:setup command when already configured and renames the npm scope. Changes are limited to markdown documentation (commands/setup.md, CHANGELOG.md, release_card.md) and metadata files (package.json, .claude-plugin/*.json). No executable code, authentication logic, data mutation, or runtime behavior is modified. The change is documentation and configuration only — no material adversarial surface is exposed.
